This econometric guide is intended for internal use of the Research
Computing Services at Harvard Business School.  I heavily borrowed
materials from books, such as Davidson and MacKinnon's "Econometric
Theory and Methods", Chris Baum's "An Introduction to Modern
Econometrics using Stata", etc., and some materials from the web.  It
is not intended for publication.

I try to include some sample codes after the concepts, in R or Stata,
depending on which one has the procedure implemented, or which one is
easier to use.
